note: Maps deployed a11oy/killinchu features to their provenance chain: paper (Zenodo DOI) -> Lean 4 proof (lutar-lean file + sha256) -> deployed feature. lean_sha256 is the full sha256 of the .lean source as shipped; recorded_status is the build-time status used only if the file is absent from the image. Badge state is decided LIVE by szl_feature_badge.resolve_proof() (comment-stripped sorry/admit count) and is NEVER green for a conjecture.

features.paper_title: SZL Thesis v18 — Formal Verification (Khipu checksum invariant)
features.note: GREEN in lutar-lean declaration manifest; runtime gate platform/src/receipts/khipu-checksum.ts. Zero real sorries.

Backs the DEV5 multi-party-witnessed AI API. BFT safety=Conjecture 2, liveness=Conjecture 3 — both proof-deferred (real `sorry` present). Economic slashing=ROADMAP. NEVER render green.
